waiver.reason_summary: The gate validation exceeded the maximum allowed execution time without completing all checks.
waiver.detail: Pre-existing gate validation timeout (3+ hours) + pre-existing catalog issues. Fixed: librechat/litellm added to service-completeness.json, tests/__init__.py created for Python package imports
substitute_evidence: ADR 0373 Phase 4 implementation complete and locally verified: 74 services registered with service_type
